reason: The existing plan lacks a clear separation between the Nexus and the browser/electron environment, leading to potential conflicts and inconsistencies. Appending a dedicated 'continuity_zone' module will ensure a clean, modular workflow. This zone will enforce a consistent workflow, preventing the browser from inadvertently altering or bypassing the core Julian identity and functionality. It will also improve performance by isolating continuity logic and reducing the need for redundant, potentially conflicting, code paths.
